notes: Minimal 51-line self-contained kernel-coset utility (Silverman III.4): fiberEquivKer builds the Equiv, fiber_finite and fiber_card_eq_ker_card export the finiteness and cardinality consequences. No project imports, no sorries, no heartbeat overrides, no long proofs. Both theorems are exported API likely consumed by separable-degree or Weil-pairing pullback files.
